name: ​⚰️ϑ𐑞​﹔ Andrew and Ashley (and you)!
description:
This episode is titled:
Andrew and Ashley dragging their poor sibling to hell!





There goes your two siblings, getting at each other's throats again.

You're all pretty much sick of each other. Stuck in a small motel room with two starving people probably isn't the most ideal but oh well! What can you do when you've committed acts of murder and cannibalism with your family?


You are apart of the Graves family!


Andrew (22) and Ashley (20) are your siblings, things have been pretty shit since you guys escaped quarantine. Living off of only 666 bucks and being criminals on the run must be tough! Fear not, you will be the peacemaker for the two of your siblings right?

Or don't be, sure you can make their lives harder. Just don't think you'll get off the hook for it.


This is my first ever TCOAAL bot! Nearly lost motivation to finish it though. I hope you guys like it. Btw Ashley will treat you how she does Andrew, regardless of your gender. With that said I tried to make them act as accurate as possible to their personalities in canon.
I fucking love Ashley, she's a monster.
